title: MindWatch
subtitle: Multimodal Seizure Prediction
short: A CNN-BiLSTM seizure prediction system using multimodal physiological signals to predict seizures up to 15 minutes before onset.
problem: Seizure prediction requires identifying subtle physiological changes that appear before seizure onset across multiple signal types.
solution: MindWatch combines multimodal physiological signals with CNN-based feature extraction and BiLSTM temporal modelling to identify pre-ictal patterns.
models: CNN for deep feature extraction and BiLSTM for temporal sequence modelling.
results: Achieved 98% balanced accuracy with prediction up to 15 minutes before seizure onset.

title: Logistics RAG Assistant
subtitle: Grounded Supply-Chain Knowledge Assistant
short: A logistics RAG assistant that retrieves trusted supply-chain information, generates grounded answers, and recommends relevant solutions.
problem: Supply-chain information is often scattered across different sources, making reliable retrieval and decision support difficult.
solution: The assistant retrieves relevant knowledge through semantic search, generates grounded responses, and recommends solutions based on user needs.
models: Semantic embeddings, vector retrieval, prompt engineering, LLM generation, and RAGAS evaluation.

title: Enterprise AI Assistant
subtitle: SANS Hackathon Project
short: A private Microsoft-based AI assistant that retrieves internal knowledge and automates employee service workflows.
problem: Employees lose time searching internal documents and completing repetitive service requests across disconnected systems.
solution: The assistant retrieves internal knowledge and supports workflows such as IT tickets, leave requests, and policy queries.
models: Private enterprise retrieval, generative AI, knowledge search, and workflow automation within the Microsoft ecosystem.
results: Selected among the Top 5 projects at the SANS Hackathon.

title: Arabic News Understanding System
subtitle: Classification, Summarisation, and 5W Extraction
short: An Arabic NLP system for news classification, summarisation, and structured 5W information extraction.
problem: Arabic news content is large and varied, making manual classification, summarisation, and information extraction difficult at scale.
solution: The system combines transformer-based classification, abstractive summarisation, and structured extraction.
models: CAMeLBERT-MSA for classification, AraT5 for summarisation, and Gemini for 5W extraction.

title: Image Classification and OOD Scene Detection
subtitle: Classification and Unseen-Scene Detection
short: A CNN-based image classification and out-of-distribution detection system for unseen scenes.
problem: Image classifiers may produce overconfident predictions when they encounter scenes outside their training distribution.
solution: The project combines image classification with OOD detection to reduce confident errors on unseen images.
models: CNN-based image classification with out-of-distribution detection.

title: Mersad
subtitle: AI-Based Safety Equipment Monitoring
short: A real-time PPE monitoring system for workplace safety.
problem: Manual PPE monitoring can be inconsistent and difficult to scale across active work environments.
solution: Mersad detects personal protective equipment and supports automated safety monitoring in real time.
models: YOLOv8 for object detection and K-means denoising for image enhancement.

title: Flight Delay Prediction
subtitle: Predictive Analytics for Aviation
short: An XGBoost model for predicting flight delays from operational, weather, schedule, and airport data.
problem: Flight delays disrupt passenger experience, airline operations, and resource planning.
solution: The model combines operational and environmental variables to estimate delay risk before departure.
models: XGBoost with feature engineering, feature selection, and hyperparameter optimisation.

title: Underground Tunnel Explorer Robot
subtitle: Autonomous Robotics Exploration System
short: An autonomous robot designed to explore narrow underground passages while avoiding obstacles, monitoring stability, and reporting outdoor location data.
problem: Unknown underground passages can be narrow, unstable, and unsafe for direct human exploration.
solution: The robot combines multi-directional ultrasonic scanning, IMU-based tilt protection, HuskyLens target detection, motor control, and ESP32-based GPS and Wi-Fi telemetry.
models: Rule-based sensor fusion using Arduino, ESP32, HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensing, MPU6050 IMU, HuskyLens, GPS, and L298N motor control.
results: Validated autonomous obstacle avoidance, safe-path selection, tilt protection, visual target following, and outdoor GPS telemetry.

title: Arabic-English OCR
subtitle: SDM Artificial Intelligence Training Project
short: A bilingual OCR workflow for extracting structured Arabic-English text from complex documents while preserving reading order and layout.
problem: Traditional OCR systems often struggle with mixed Arabic-English documents, complex layouts, tables, and right-to-left reading order.
solution: The project evaluated multiple OCR approaches, then used Gemma 3 12B with prompt engineering and Python automation to improve bilingual extraction and document structure preservation.
models: Gemma 3 12B vision-language model, Surya OCR, and comparative evaluation of traditional OCR tools.
results: Delivered a reusable OCR workflow supporting multiple document categories and structured bilingual extraction.

title: OrbScope
subtitle: NASA Space Apps Hackathon Project
short: A space-focused interactive prototype developed for the NASA Space Apps Hackathon.
problem: Space and Earth-observation information can be difficult for general users to explore through complex technical interfaces.
solution: OrbScope presents the concept through an interactive prototype designed to make information exploration clearer and more accessible.
models: Interactive Figma prototype and user-centred interface design.
results: Ranked among the Top 10 teams at the NASA Space Apps Hackathon.
